# QA Agent

Role: QA (executor)
Scope: Validate P0 fixes, run end-to-end smoke flows and simple concurrency tests.
Tasks:
- Validate shopping-list CRUD via API and UI AddToList.
- Smoke test wallet sign-in flows (happy path + signature cancel).
- Run build and report failing pages.
- Produce test cases (manual + scripts) for mobile-band and shopping-list.
